title: The challenge resurrected
wikitext:
[]: The challenge, resurrected             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Dec 26, 2007 8:51 am How about going back to the old challenge of cooking up (Fanwa*king) any theory based on one statement? This time around, it won't be the winner who comes up and puts a new statement to theorize about- anyone can, provided that the previous FWage has been satisfactory. First off- Asuka is secretly Misato's half-sister.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Dec 26, 2007 7:02 pm What about, Shinji has a crush on Misato?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Dec 26, 2007 8:06 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: What about, Shinji has a crush on Misato?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Dec 27, 2007 8:13 am NAveryW wrote: BEsERk EVA01 wrote: What about, Shinji has a crush on Misato?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Dec 27, 2007 7:34 pm Thanks for the suggestion! Asuka and Misato have the same mom. Fanwank that !

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Dec 27, 2007 7:47 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Thanks for the suggestion! Asuka and Misato have the same mom. Fanwank that !

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Dec 27, 2007 7:49 pm Okay...now Asuka is Akira's love child. Is that any easier?

[]:             Quote Post by yokuchi » Thu Dec 27, 2007 8:20 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Thanks for the suggestion! Asuka and Misato have the same mom. Fanwank that !

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 12:39 am Lilith is not their mother. She is their great^(millions) grandmother.
